blockers.message: Incomplete kickoff owners: 产品负责人, 业务验收人-销售侧, 业务验收人-管理侧, 研发负责人, 前端负责人, 后端负责人, 测试负责人

Kickoff governance decision is No-Go; V1 validation requires Go.
Incomplete launch environment fields: 测试环境名称, 前端访问地址, 后端 API 地址, Git 提交号, UAT窗口, 证据归档位置
Incomplete UAT participants: UAT-SALES, UAT-MANAGER, UAT-PRODUCT, UAT-TEST, UAT-DEV, UAT-PM

Environment evidence decision is No-Go; V1 validation requires Go.
Evidence pack still contains draft placeholders.
Missing basic evidence pack owners: 测试负责人, 产品负责人, 销售侧验收人, 管理侧验收人
Basic evidence pack owners use role labels instead of named people: 研发负责人
Missing passed environment evidence: 销售个人账号, 销售负责人账号, 权限样本账号
Missing passed UAT evidence: UAT-001, UAT-002, UAT-003, UAT-004, UAT-005, UAT-006, UAT-007, UAT-008, UAT-009, UAT-010
P0/S1 defect row is missing or invalid.
P1/S2 defect row is missing or invalid.
Unsatisfied Go/No-Go criteria: 测试环境 Smoke, P0 缺陷, P1 缺陷, 业务验收, 上线风险
Incomplete signoff rows: 销售侧验收人, 管理侧验收人, 产品负责人, 测试负责人, 研发负责人, 项目负责人

Evidence rows not marked PASS: ENV-EVIDENCE, PRE-001, PRE-002, PRE-003, PRE-004, PRE-005, PRE-006, SMK-001, SMK-002, SMK-003, SMK-004, SMK-005, UAT-001, UAT-002, UAT-003, UAT-004, UAT-005, UAT-006, UAT-007, UAT-008, UAT-009, UAT-010, DEF-REGISTER, DEF-P0, DEF-P1, SIGNOFF-REGISTER, SIGNOFF-SALES, SIGNOFF-MANAGER, SIGNOFF-PRODUCT, SIGNOFF-TEST, SIGNOFF-DEV, SIGNOFF-PM, GO-NOGO
Manifest decision is No-Go; V1 validation requires Go.
Roles pending assignment or status: 销售侧验收人, 管理侧验收人, 产品负责人, 测试负责人, 项目负责人
Tracker role owners use role labels instead of named people: 研发负责人
Incomplete PRE checks: PRE-001, PRE-002, PRE-003, PRE-004, PRE-005, PRE-006
Incomplete SMK checks: SMK-001, SMK-002, SMK-003, SMK-004, SMK-005
Incomplete UAT cases: UAT-001, UAT-002, UAT-003, UAT-004, UAT-005, UAT-006, UAT-007, UAT-008, UAT-009, UAT-010
P0/S1 and P1/S2 defect rows must show no open defects and concrete evidence.
Incomplete release gates: UAT证据包一致性, UAT缺陷台账一致性, UAT签署台账一致性, V1最终放行门禁, 项目签署

Invalid P0/P1 summary rows: P0 / S1 阻断, P1 / S2 严重
Incomplete defect details: DEF-DRAFT
Defect register decision is No-Go; V1 validation requires Go.
Incomplete signoffs: SIGNOFF-SALES, SIGNOFF-MANAGER, SIGNOFF-PRODUCT, SIGNOFF-TEST, SIGNOFF-DEV, SIGNOFF-PM
Project signoff is No-Go and register decision is No-Go; V1 validation requires Go.
